## Melon Mod Manager 1.7.10

Tag: `v1.7.10`

This 1.7.10 release focuses on cleanup, uninstall behavior, and a few UI polish updates across the app and website.

### Fixes and improvements

- Added uninstall cleanup for Melon-owned settings, cache, and temp data while leaving Minecraft mods, resource packs, and shader packs untouched.
- Wired the Windows uninstall flow to open the thank-you page on the production site after a successful uninstall.
- Refreshed the About dialog copy so it reads more naturally and explains the app more clearly.
- Replaced the idle App Update button icon with a clearer update icon and covered it with a widget test.
- Updated the website so clickable links and buttons consistently show the pointer cursor.

### Included assets

- Windows installer (`MelonModManager-Win64-Setup-1.7.10.exe`)
- Portable Windows build (`melon_mod_manager_windows_portable.zip`)
- Linux package (`MelonModManager-Linux-Setup-1.7.10.tar.gz`)
- Checksums (`SHA256SUMS.txt`, `SHA256SUMS-linux.txt`)
